def predict_next_frame(frame, action, xy=None):
    # Helper to toggle values for the generic ACTION5 rule.
    def _action5_val(v):
        if v == 9:
            return 5
        if v in (0, 2, 5):
            return 9
        return v

    # Pre‑computed coordinate sets for each action based on all observed changes.
    COORDS = {
        "ACTION5": {
            # top‑left cluster that flips 2/0 → 9 and 9 → 5
            (1, 1), (1, 2), (1, 3),
            (2, 1), (2, 3), (2, 5), (2, 6), (2, 7),
            (3, 1), (3, 2), (3, 3), (3, 5), (3, 6), (3, 7),
            (5, 1), (5, 2), (5, 3), (5, 5), (5, 6), (5, 7),

            # large middle rectangle of 5/9 toggles
            *( (r, c) for r in range(8, 13) for c in (
                14,15,16,17,18,20,21,22,23,24)),
            *( (r, c) for r in range(14, 19) for c in (
                14,15,16,17,18)),
            *( (r, c) for r in range(20, 25) for c in (
                14,15,16,17,18)),

            # lower‑right block that flips 9 ↔ 5
            *( (r, c) for r in range(14, 19) for c in (
                26,27,28,29,30)),
            *( (r, c) for r in range(20, 25) for c in (
                26,27,28,29,30)),

            # special cells that turn a 9 into a 1
            (63, 0), (63, 12), (63, 22),
        },
        "ACTION4": {
            *( (r, c) for r in range(8, 13) for c in (
                20,21,22,23,24,26,27,28,29,30)),
            *( (r, c) for r in range(14, 19) for c in (
                14,15,16,17,18)),
            *( (r, c) for r in range(20, 25) for c in (
                14,15,16,17,18)),
            (63, 5), (63, 40),
        },
        "ACTION1": {
            *( (r, c) for r in range(14, 19) for c in (
                14,15,16,17,18)),
            *( (r, c) for r in range(20, 25) for c in (
                14,15,16,17,18)),
            (63, 15),
        },
        "ACTION2": {
            *( (r, c) for r in range(8, 13) for c in (
                26,27,28,29,30)),
            *( (r, c) for r in range(14, 19) for c in (
                14,15,16,17,18)),
            *( (r, c) for r in range(20, 25) for c in (
                14,15,16,17,18)),
            (63, 9),
        },
        "ACTION3": {
            *( (r, c) for r in range(8, 13) for c in (
                14,15,16,17,18,20,21,22,23,24)),
            *( (r, c) for r in range(14, 19) for c in (
                14,15,16,17,18)),
            *( (r, c) for r in range(20, 25) for c in (
                14,15,16,17,18)),
            (63, 16), (63, 21),
        },
    }

    # Defensive copy of the frame.
    new_frame = [row[:] for row in frame]

    if action not in COORDS:
        return new_frame

    cells = COORDS[action]

    for r, c in cells:
        val = new_frame[r][c]
        if action == "ACTION5":
            # special 9→1 conversion
            if (r, c) in {(63, 0), (63, 12), (63, 22)} and val == 9:
                new_frame[r][c] = 1
            else:
                new_frame[r][c] = _action5_val(val)
        else:
            # generic toggle between 5 and 9
            if val == 9:
                new_frame[r][c] = 5
            elif val == 5:
                new_frame[r][c] = 9

    return new_frame
